sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ وَلَدٌ اسْمُهُ صَالِحٌ أَنْ يُهْدِيَ أُمَّهُ شَيْئًا فِي عِيدِ الْأُمِّ.
sentences.translation: Dječak po imenu Salih je htio pokloniti majci nešto za Dan majki.
sentences.translationEn: A boy named Salih wanted to give his mother a gift on Mother's Day.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ عِنْدَهُ مَالٌ كَثِيرٌ فَفَكَّرَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Nije imao mnogo novca pa je puno razmišljao.
sentences.translationEn: He did not have much money so he thought a lot.

sentences.arabic: رَسَمَ صُورَتَهَا وَكَتَبَ عَلَيْهَا: «أَنْتِ أَحْسَنُ أُمٍّ فِي الْعَالَمِ».
sentences.translation: Nacrtao je njenu sliku i napisao na njoj: «Ti si najbolja majka na svijetu».
sentences.translationEn: He drew her portrait and wrote on it: «You are the best mother in the world».

sentences.translation: Majka je zaplakala od radosti i zagrlila ga.
sentences.translationEn: His mother cried from joy and hugged him.
